name: canshare-tnm-gi-colorectal-pn
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal colon and/or rectum pathological N category
description: A pathological regional lymph node stage (pN) of a gastrointestional colon and/or rectum tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
